option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <size android:width="10dp" android:height="10dp" /> <solid android:color="#2C3E50" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <size android:width="10dp" android:height="10dp" /> <solid android:color="#BFCBD6" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ripple xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:color="#1A2A5298"> <item> <shape android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="#26FFFFFF" /> <stroke android:width="1dp" android:color="#332A5298" /> <corners android:radius="24dp" /> </shape> </item> </ripple>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- Background --> <ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/bg_gradient" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Top Bar --> <com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/topAppBar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/transparent" app:title="" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Nút Quay lại (Legacy, kept for reference but usually handled by topAppBar) --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="36dp" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:visibility="gone" app:icon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="24dp" app:iconTint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/ShapeAppearance.MaterialComponents.SmallComponent" app:cornerRadius="24dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/camera_main_title" android:fontFamily="@font/pacifico_regular" android:shadowColor="#FFFFFF" android:shadowRadius="8" android:shadowDx="0" android:shadowDy="0" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="30sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/topAppBar" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/camera_header_subtitle" android:textColor="#1F618D" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvTitle" />
<!-- Khung Camera chính --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/previewCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:cardElevation="12dp" app:layout_constraintDimensionRatio="1:1" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSubtitle">
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<androidx.camera.view.PreviewView android:id="@+id/viewFinder" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCountdown" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:text="@string/capture_countdown_default" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="120sp" android:visibility="gone" android:shadowColor="#80000000" android:shadowDx="4" android:shadowDy="4" android:shadowRadius="15"/> </FrameLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Nút chọn tỉ lệ --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/ratioContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" app:singleSelection="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btnRatioSquare" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/previewCard">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioSquare" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/ratio_square" android:textColor="#2A5298" app:strokeColor="#2A5298" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioWide" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/ratio_wide" android:textColor="#2A5298" app:strokeColor="#2A5298" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<!-- Status & Progress --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvCaptureStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:text="@string/capture_status_ready" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/ratioContainer" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/dotContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:orientation="horizontal" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvCaptureStatus" />
<com.google.android.material.progressindicator.LinearProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/captureProgress" android:layout_width="160dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" app:indicatorColor="#2A5298" app:trackColor="#D1D9E6" app:trackThickness="4dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/dotContainer" />
<!-- Nút Switch Camera --> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnSwitchCamera" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@drawable/ic_flip_camera" android:contentDescription="@string/camera_switch_lens" app:tint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture" />
<!-- Nút Flash --> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnFlash" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@drawable/ic_flash_off_24" android:contentDescription="@string/camera_flash_toggle" app:tint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture" />
<!-- Nút Capture --> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnCapture" android:layout_width="80dp" android:layout_height="80dp" android:layout_marginBottom="22dp" android:background="@drawable/selector_camera_btn" android:contentDescription="@string/capture_photo" android:elevation="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<!-- Last Capture Preview --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardLastCapture" android:layout_width="60dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:visibility="gone" app:cardCornerRadius="8dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivLastCapturePreview" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerCrop" /> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Flash Overlay --> <View android:id="@+id/captureFlashOverlay" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@android:color/white" android:visibility="gone" android:elevation="100dp" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- Background --> <ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/bg_gradient" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Top Bar --> <com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/topAppBar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/transparent" app:title="" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Nút Quay lại (Legacy, kept for reference but usually handled by topAppBar) --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="36dp" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:visibility="gone" app:icon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="24dp" app:iconTint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/ShapeAppearance.MaterialComponents.SmallComponent" app:cornerRadius="24dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/camera_title_margin_top" android:text="@string/camera_main_title" android:fontFamily="@font/pacifico_regular" android:shadowColor="#FFFFFF" android:shadowRadius="8" android:shadowDx="0" android:shadowDy="0" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="30sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/topAppBar" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/camera_subtitle_margin_top" android:text="@string/camera_header_subtitle" android:textColor="#1F618D" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvTitle" />
<!-- Khung Camera chính --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/previewCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/camera_preview_horizontal_margin" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/camera_preview_margin_top" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/camera_preview_horizontal_margin" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:cardElevation="12dp" app:layout_constraintDimensionRatio="1:1" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvSubtitle">
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<androidx.camera.view.PreviewView android:id="@+id/viewFinder" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCountdown" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:text="@string/capture_countdown_default" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="120sp" android:visibility="gone" android:shadowColor="#80000000" android:shadowDx="4" android:shadowDy="4" android:shadowRadius="15"/> </FrameLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Nút chọn tỉ lệ --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/ratioContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/camera_ratio_margin_top" app:singleSelection="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btnRatioSquare" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/previewCard">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioSquare" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/ratio_square" android:textColor="#2A5298" app:strokeColor="#2A5298" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioWide" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/ratio_wide" android:textColor="#2A5298" app:strokeColor="#2A5298" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<!-- Status & Progress --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvCaptureStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/camera_status_margin_top" android:text="@string/capture_status_ready" android:textColor="#2A5298" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/ratioContainer" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/dotContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/camera_dot_margin_top" android:orientation="horizontal" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvCaptureStatus" />
<com.google.android.material.progressindicator.LinearProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/captureProgress" android:layout_width="@dimen/camera_progress_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/camera_progress_margin_top" app:indicatorColor="#2A5298" app:trackColor="#D1D9E6" app:trackThickness="4dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/dotContainer" />
<!-- Nút Switch Camera --> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnSwitchCamera" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@drawable/ic_flip_camera" android:contentDescription="@string/camera_switch_lens" app:tint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture" />
<!-- Nút Flash --> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnFlash" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_flash_pill" android:src="@drawable/ic_flash_off_24" android:contentDescription="@string/camera_flash_toggle" android:padding="12dp" app:tint="#2A5298" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture" />
<!-- Nút Capture --> <ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnCapture" android:layout_width="80dp" android:layout_height="80dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/camera_capture_bottom_margin" android:background="@drawable/selector_camera_btn" android:contentDescription="@string/capture_photo" android:elevation="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<!-- Last Capture Preview --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardLastCapture" android:layout_width="60dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/camera_last_capture_margin_start" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/camera_last_capture_margin_bottom" android:visibility="gone" app:cardCornerRadius="8dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/btnCapture" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivLastCapturePreview" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerCrop" /> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Flash Overlay --> <View android:id="@+id/captureFlashOverlay" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@android:color/white" android:visibility="gone" android:elevation="100dp" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">ExpressionPhotoBooth</string> <string name="author">Trọng Đức</string> <string name="capture_photo">Capture</string> <string name="ratio_square">1:1</string> <string name="ratio_wide">16:9</string> <string name="camera_not_ready">Camera is not ready yet</string> <string name="failed_create_folder">Cannot create photo folder</string> <string name="capture_failed">Capture failed</string> <string name="camera_permission_granted">Camera permission granted</string> <string name="camera_permission_denied">Camera permission denied</string> <string name="camera_permission_required">Camera permission is required</string> <string name="photo_saved_path">Saved: %1$s</string> <string name="no_photo_to_continue">No photos captured</string> <string name="no_photo_to_edit">No photo selected for editing</string> <string name="failed_open_photo">Cannot open selected photo</string> <string name="failed_save_temp_result">Cannot create edited preview</string> <string name="no_result_to_show">No result image to display</string> <string name="no_result_to_save">No result image to save</string> <string name="failed_save_result">Failed to save image</string> <string name="saved_to_gallery">Saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="no_images_for_video">No captured images to create video</string> <string name="exporting_video">Exporting timelapse video...</string> <string name="failed_save_video">Failed to export video</string> <string name="video_saved_to_gallery">Video saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="video_saved_success">Video da luu vao thu vien!</string> <string name="processing_collage">Dang xu ly anh ghep...</string> <string name="back">Back</string> <string name="title_setup">CHOOSE YOUR FRAME</string> <string name="title_camera">Camera</string> <string name="title_selection">OUR MEMORIES</string> <string name="title_edit">Edit Photo</string> <string name="title_result">Result</string> <string name="btn_edit">EDIT</string> <string name="btn_edit_with_count">EDIT (%1$d)</string> <string name="btn_result">RESULT</string> <string name="btn_result_with_count">RESULT (%1$d/%2$d)</string> <string name="select_enough_for_result">Hay chon du %1$d anh de xuat ket qua</string> <string name="select_one_photo_for_edit">Vui long chon 1 anh de chinh sua</string> <string name="batch_edit_start">Dang chinh sua %1$d anh da chon</string> <string name="batch_edit_completed">Da hoan thanh chinh sua anh da chon</string> <string name="batch_edit_cancelled">Da dung chinh sua hang loat</string> <string name="selected_strip_title">Selected photos</string> <string name="clear_selection">Clear</string> <string name="selection_status_initial">Selected: 0/0</string> <string name="selection_status_none">Selected: 0/%1$d</string> <string name="selection_status_selected">Selected: %1$d/%2$d</string> <string name="capture_status_ready">Ready to capture</string> <string name="capture_status_starting">Starting capture sequence (%1$d photos)</string> <string name="capture_status_next">Prepare for photo %1$d/%2$d</string> <string name="capture_status_countdown">Photo %1$d/%2$d in %3$ds</string> <string name="capture_status_captured">Captured %1$d/%2$d photos</string> <string name="capture_status_done">Done! %1$d photos captured</string> <string name="capture_status_error">Capture interrupted. Please try again.</string> <string name="camera_header_title">Memories</string> <string name="camera_main_title">Smile for Camera</string> <string name="camera_header_subtitle">Elegant Capture Experience</string> <string name="capture_countdown_default">3</string> <string name="btn_start_capturing">START CAPTURING</string> <string name="camera_result_overlay_title">Select your best shot</string> <string name="btn_next_to_edit">Next to Edit</string> <string name="setup_title">Choose Your Frame</string> <string name="setup_subtitle">Select a frame for your photo</string> <string name="setup_count_4">4 photos</string> <string name="setup_count_6">6 photos</string> <string name="btn_next_decorated">✦ NEXT ✦</string> <string name="result_title">Your Result</string> <string name="result_subtitle">Save your memories</string> <string name="btn_save_png_decorated">✦ SAVE PNG ✦</string> <string name="btn_save_video_decorated">✦ SAVE VIDEO ✦</string> <string name="selection_instruction">Choose a photo to enhance or proceed to result</string> <string name="edit_section_presets">Presets</string> <string name="edit_section_filters">Filters</string> <string name="edit_section_frames">Frames</string> <string name="edit_section_stickers">Stickers</string> <string name="edit_preset_cute">Cute</string> <string name="edit_preset_kpop">K-pop</string> <string name="edit_preset_classic">Classic</string> <string name="edit_option_none">None</string> <string name="edit_filter_soft">Soft</string> <string name="edit_filter_bw">B/W</string> <string name="edit_frame_cortis">Cortis</string> <string name="edit_frame_t1">T1</string> <string name="edit_frame_aespa">Aespa</string> <string name="edit_sticker_star">Star</string> <string name="edit_sticker_flash">Flash</string> <string name="edit_sticker_camera">Camera</string> <string name="btn_save_return">SAVE & RETURN</string> <string name="btn_start_decorated">✦ START ✦</string> <string name="camera_switch_lens">Switch Camera</string> <string name="camera_flash_toggle">Toggle Flash</string> <string name="camera_flash_on">Flash on</string> <string name="camera_flash_off">Flash off</string> <string name="camera_flash_back_only">Flash is only available on back camera</string> <string name="item_concept_placeholder">Concept</string> <string name="item_frame_placeholder">Frame</string> <string name="item_selected_badge">SELECTED</string> <string name="item_selected_order_placeholder">1</string> <string name="edit_summary_default">Filter: None • Frame: None • Sticker: None</string> <string name="edit_summary_format">Filter: %1$s • Frame: %2$s • Sticker: %3$s</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">ExpressionPhotoBooth</string> <string name="author">Trọng Đức</string> <string name="capture_photo">Capture</string> <string name="ratio_square">1:1</string> <string name="ratio_wide">16:9</string> <string name="camera_not_ready">Camera is not ready yet</string> <string name="failed_create_folder">Cannot create photo folder</string> <string name="capture_failed">Capture failed</string> <string name="camera_permission_granted">Camera permission granted</string> <string name="camera_permission_denied">Camera permission denied</string> <string name="camera_permission_required">Camera permission is required</string> <string name="photo_saved_path">Saved: %1$s</string> <string name="no_photo_to_continue">No photos captured</string> <string name="no_photo_to_edit">No photo selected for editing</string> <string name="failed_open_photo">Cannot open selected photo</string> <string name="failed_save_temp_result">Cannot create edited preview</string> <string name="no_result_to_show">No result image to display</string> <string name="no_result_to_save">No result image to save</string> <string name="failed_save_result">Failed to save image</string> <string name="saved_to_gallery">Saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="no_images_for_video">No captured images to create video</string> <string name="exporting_video">Exporting timelapse video...</string> <string name="failed_save_video">Failed to export video</string> <string name="video_saved_to_gallery">Video saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="video_saved_success">Video da luu vao thu vien!</string> <string name="processing_collage">Dang xu ly anh ghep...</string> <string name="back">Back</string> <string name="title_setup">CHOOSE YOUR FRAME</string> <string name="title_camera">Camera</string> <string name="title_selection">OUR MEMORIES</string> <string name="title_edit">Edit Photo</string> <string name="title_result">Result</string> <string name="btn_edit">EDIT</string> <string name="btn_edit_with_count">EDIT (%1$d)</string> <string name="btn_result">RESULT</string> <string name="btn_result_with_count">RESULT (%1$d/%2$d)</string> <string name="select_enough_for_result">Hay chon du %1$d anh de xuat ket qua</string> <string name="select_one_photo_for_edit">Vui long chon 1 anh de chinh sua</string> <string name="batch_edit_start">Dang chinh sua %1$d anh da chon</string> <string name="batch_edit_completed">Da hoan thanh chinh sua anh da chon</string> <string name="batch_edit_cancelled">Da dung chinh sua hang loat</string> <string name="selected_strip_title">Selected photos</string> <string name="clear_selection">Clear</string> <string name="selection_status_initial">Selected: 0/0</string> <string name="selection_status_none">Selected: 0/%1$d</string> <string photos)</string> <string name="capture_status_next">Prepare for photo %1$d/%2$d</string> <string name="capture_status_countdown">Photo %1$d/%2$d in %3$ds</string> <string Please try again.</string> <string name="camera_header_title">Memories</string> <string name="camera_main_title">Smile for Camera</string> <string name="camera_header_subtitle">Elegant Capture
